title: Pvt Ltd Registration in Madhya Pradesh | Virtual Auditor
description: Pvt Ltd Registration in Madhya Pradesh. From ₹8,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Private limited company registration under Companies Act 201. Contact +91 9962
bodyText:
What is private limited company registration? Private limited company registration under Companies Act 2013. SPICe+ filing, DSC, DIN, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN.
Private Limited Company Registration is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Madhya Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh since 2012.
Quick Answer: Pvt Ltd Registration in Madhya Pradesh — Private limited company registration under Companies Act 2013. SPICe+ filing, DSC, DIN, MOA/AOA, PAN. From ₹8,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Private Limited Company Registration in Madhya Pradesh
Virtual Auditor provides private limited company registration across Madhya Pradesh. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Madhya Pradesh with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Gwalior handles company registrations and filings for Madhya Pradesh. Stamp duty: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• SPICe+ Form Filing (INC-32)
• DSC & DIN for Directors
• Name Reservation (RUN/SPICe+ Part A)
• MOA & AOA Drafting
• PAN/TAN Allotment
• Post-Incorporation Compliance Setup

HEADING2: Step-by-Step Process
• 1
HEADING3: Step 1: Obtain DSC
Digital Signature Certificate for all directors
• 2
HEADING3: Step 2: Reserve Company Name
Via SPICe+ Part A or RUN form
• 3
HEADING3: Step 3: File SPICe+ Part B

• 4

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Madhya Pradesh
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your pvt ltd registration is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: How much does Pvt Ltd registration cost?
faqs.a: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 covering government fees, DSC, DIN, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. 5-15 working days.

faqs.q: What documents are needed for company registration?
faqs.a: PAN & Aadhaar of directors, address proof, passport-size photos, registered office address proof (utility bill + NOC/rent agreement), and proposed company name.

faqs.q: How long does company registration take?
faqs.a: 5-15 working days from document submission. Same-day DSC issuance, 2-3 days for name approval, 3-7 days for incorporation certificate.

faqs.q: Do you provide pvt ltd registration services in Madhya Pradesh?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Madhya Pradesh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Madhya Pradesh?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Madhya Pradesh fall under ROC Gwalior. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Madhya Pradesh-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Madhya Pradesh?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Madhya Pradesh: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
